chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-6144 & 6145 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- C.P.No.D-6144/2024 1.For hearing of Misc.No.27234/2024 2.For hearing of main case. C.P.No.D-6145/2024 1.For hearing of Misc.No.27231/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 07.04.2025 Mr.Imran Iqbal, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr.Muhammad Ahmed, D.A.G. Mr.Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent. Learned counsel states that the impugned assessment is unwarranted in view of the judgments of High Court and Hon’ble Supreme of Pakistan (copies available at pages 65 to 135, C.P.No.D-6144/2024), however, the said objection shall be taken by the petitioners in statutory appeal against the impugned order. In view hereof, learned counsel seeks to withdraw these petitions and states that he shall pursue the remedy before statutory hierarchy. In view hereof, these petitions are disposed of in the said terms. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
